title: MobCountMod
description: Counts entities in a region around you
body:
MobCountMod
===============

Shows under the categories passive and hostile entity each entity with a count next to the name and a total count

Config keybind: P + C

If you have questions or need help with something, the fastest way to get answers is to join [Discord](https://discord.gg/VTHVVgt "Discord"), otherwise put them on my github incase of crashes/bugs [click here](https://github.com/vacla/mobcountmod/issues "click here")

## Want to support development?
If you want to support development, check out my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Annevdl29 "Patreon")! Supporting me via Patreon lets me spend more time modding, and allows me to put out more updates for everyone to enjoy.
